subcodes.first_line: O thou who art assured in the celestial Kingdom and divine sign of the All-Merciful, may God increase thy attraction to the Supreme Concourse [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها الموقنه الملکوتیه و الایه الرحمانیه زادک الله انجذابا الی الملاء الاعلی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @education of children; moral education
